auth.studioLoginSubtitle: Log in with your account to get started
auth.studioHeroText: Your AI-powered content engine. Generate, optimize and publish professional content in your own brand voice — across all platforms at once.
auth.studioFeaturesLabel: What makes the Content Studio unique?
auth.studioSecurityNote: 100% European infrastructure. Your data stays in the EU (Hetzner DE, Mistral FR, DeepL DE).

usp.aiDesc: Generate blogs, social posts and video scripts based on real-time online behavior via our multi-source strategy.
usp.seoDesc: Built-in SEO scoring and automatic improvement for maximum discoverability (self-learning system).
usp.calendarDesc: Plan and publish content across all channels from a single overview, including batch function and campaign tool.
usp.translateDesc: Translate with unmatched accuracy to 100+ languages with one click.
usp.brandDesc: Your brand identity, audiences and knowledge base as the foundation for every AI generation.
usp.analyticsDesc: Statistics per content item and channel for automatic content improvement.

auth.compareTitle: AI Content Studio vs. Hootsuite vs. Jasper AI
auth.compareSubtitle: One platform combining content generation, SEO, multilingual publishing and distribution. No more separate tools.
auth.serverError: An error occurred. Please try again.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

studio.heroSubtitle: Generate, plan and publish content across all your platforms from one intelligent workspace. One concept, multiple platforms - the AI does the work. You review, approve and save {pct} of your time.{ast}

concept.title: ConceptDialog
concept.desc: One concept, multiple platforms. Platform tabs with live preview, score and character counter.

campaign.title: 1-Click Campaign
campaign.desc: Blog + 5 social posts in one go. AI generates, you review. From idea to publish in minutes.

learning.title: Self-learning AI
learning.desc: Learns from your results. Score calibration based on actual engagement. Gets smarter every week.

analytics.title: Smart Analytics
analytics.desc: Sparklines, pillar distribution, gap detection, score correlation and top-performer tracking. Know what works.

personal.title: Hyper-personalized
personal.desc: Brand Profile, Knowledge Base, Audience Personas, Tone of Voice. Content that sounds like your brand.

calendar.title: Smart Calendar
calendar.desc: AI fills your calendar. Trending topics, seasons, content pillars — automatically distributed and scheduled.

trending.title: Multi-Source Trending Analysis
trending.desc: Google Trends, website traffic, SISTRIX SEO data and manual input — combined in one trending dashboard with sparklines and pillar color coding.

compare.title: AI Content Studio vs. The Competition
compare.subtitle: Compare on what truly matters
compare.total: No other platform offers this combination

alternatives.title: AI Content Studio vs. Agency vs. In-house
alternatives.subtitle: Why AI is the smartest investment

studio.securityNote: 100% European infrastructure. Your data stays in the EU (Hetzner DE, Mistral FR, DeepL DE).

toneOfVoice.title: Tone of Voice
toneOfVoice.subtitle: AI content style: personality, target audience, brand values
toneOfVoice.info: These settings guide AI content generation. All generated content will reflect this tone.
toneOfVoice.personalityHelp: How should the AI sound? E.g. "warm, friendly, adventurous"
toneOfVoice.audienceHelp: Who is the content for? Age, interests, origin.
toneOfVoice.coreKeywordsHelp: Keywords that should always be considered for content.
toneOfVoice.avoidWordsHelp: Words the AI should never use, comma-separated.
toneOfVoice.samplePhrasesHelp: Inspirational phrases the AI should emulate.

blockTypes.mobile_program_info: Displays a day program (morning/afternoon/evening) with POIs and events based on time of day. Automatic selection by rating, category, and diversity.
blockTypes.mobile_tip_info: Shows a daily tip (POI or event) based on the visitor's onboarding interests. Automatically refreshes every 24 hours.
blockTypes.mobile_events_info: Horizontally scrollable list of today's events. Automatically shows category emojis and times.
blockTypes.mobile_map_info: Interactive map with top POIs per category. Shows colored markers and category filters.

pagesNav.subtitle: Manage page layouts, blocks and navigation items

onboarding.title: Add New Destination
onboarding.subtitle: Follow the steps to configure and activate a new destination.
onboarding.name: Name
onboarding.nameHelper: Display name of the destination (e.g. Calpe, Texel)
onboarding.navHelper: Customize the default navigation items. Order and labels are editable.
onboarding.pagesHelper: Select which template pages should be created automatically.

steps.welcomeDesc: Discover the capabilities of your workspace.
steps.brandProfileDesc: Add company name, industry, USPs and tone of voice so AI generates on-brand content.
steps.connectSocialDesc: Link Facebook, Instagram or LinkedIn so content can be published directly.
steps.firstSuggestionDesc: Let AI generate your first content suggestions based on your brand profile.
steps.planItemDesc: Choose a content item and schedule it on the calendar.
steps.viewCalendarDesc: Overview of planned and published content by day, week or month.
steps.explorePoisDesc: View and manage the Points of Interest in your destination.
steps.testChatbotDesc: Ask the AI chatbot a question and experience how visitors discover your destination.
steps.checkEventsDesc: Discover the events module with local happenings.
steps.inviteTeamDesc: Add colleagues so they can contribute and review content.

contentStudio.noSuggestions: No suggestions. Click "Generate Suggestions" to create AI suggestions.

brand.title: Brand Voice Score
brand.description: Measures how well your content aligns with the configured brand identity of this destination. The score is based on tone-of-voice, word choice, core values and target audience fit.
brand.poor: Insufficient — content doesn't match your brand identity
brand.toneMatchInfo: Does the writing style match your defined personality and audience?
brand.vocabularyInfo: Are your core keywords and desired adjectives used?
